description: Game design v2 — 4 schools per character, ~15 cards per school

characters.name: Warrior
characters.description: Melee combatant — balanced between offense, defense, sustain and disruption.

cards.name: Thunder Wave
cards.description: Deal 6 damage to all. Vuln 1. Weak 1.
cards.upgradeDescription: Deal 9 damage to all. Vuln 1. Weak 1.

characters.name: Sage
characters.description: Arcane caster — elemental damage, burn DOT, frost control, and arcane utility.

cards.name: Absolute Zero
cards.description: Deal 8 damage to all. Vuln 2. Weak 2.
cards.upgradeDescription: Deal 12 damage to all. Vuln 2. Weak 2.

cards.name: Cosmic Ray
cards.description: Deal 12 damage to all. Vuln 1. Weak 1.
cards.upgradeDescription: Deal 16 damage to all. Vuln 2. Weak 1.

characters.name: Ranger
characters.description: Agile fighter — precision strikes, poisons, shadow debuffs, and nature healing.

cards.name: Smoke Bomb
cards.description: Deal 8 damage to all. Weak 2. Vuln 2.
cards.upgradeDescription: Deal 12 damage to all. Weak 2. Vuln 2.

starterDeckStructure.description: Each character starts with 12 cards: 3 per school (the isStarter cards).

rewardStructure.description: After combat, players pick from reward cards of their character's schools (non-starter cards).

encounters.description: A lone scout blocks your path.
A swarm of rats ambushes you!

bonuses.name: +10 Max HP
bonuses.description: Permanently increase your max HP by 10.

bonuses.name: +20 Max HP
bonuses.description: Permanently increase your max HP by 20.

bonuses.name: Lucky Draw
bonuses.description: First reroll each turn is free.
